dynamodb.table.s3bucketsource.CfnAbout: The S3 bucket that is being imported from.

dynamodb.table.s3bucketsource.S3Bucket.Description: The S3 bucket that is being imported from.

dynamodb.table.s3bucketsource.S3BucketOw.Description: The account number of the S3 bucket that is being imported from. If the bucket is owned by the requester this is optional.

dynamodb.table.s3bucketsource.S3KeyPrefi.Description: The key prefix shared by all S3 Objects that are being imported.
